description_long: This is a stylized figure of an adult male dressed in formal attire, posed dynamically as if performing a ballet or dance move. The figure wears a suit jacket, dress shirt, and tie, with one arm raised and the other extended to the side, while balancing on one leg with the other leg extended backward. The facial features are simplified and angular, giving the figure a low-poly, artistic appearance. The tie is depicted as fluttering, suggesting motion, and the figure stands on a faceted, polygonal base. The overall form is rigid and geometric, with sharp edges and flat surfaces, emphasizing a modern, abstract aesthetic. The base is solid and provides stability for the upright, expressive pose.
description: A stylized adult male in a suit, posed in a dynamic dance stance with one leg raised and arms extended, standing on a polygonal base. The figure has simplified, angular features and a fluttering tie, emphasizing motion and formality.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the expressive face, outstretched left arm, and raised right leg with the tie clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the profile of the face, the extended left arm, and the backward-raised right leg.
description_view_2: Back-left view focusing on the outstretched right arm, the back of the head, and the extended left leg.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the suit, the raised right arm, and the extended right leg from behind.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with dress shirt and necktie
attribute_posture: dynamic dance pose with one leg raised and arms extended
